metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🕸️ Web Application Attack Chain
---
Correlates WAF blocks/allows with web server error responses to detect successful exploitation. A WAF allow followed by application errors from the same IP is a confirmed attack that bypassed WAF rules."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🛡️ WAF Activity Overview (Fortinet WAF / F5)"},"name":"waf-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor has_any ('Fortinet', 'F5') and DeviceProduct has_any ('WAF', 'BIG-IP', 'ASM', 'FortiWeb')
| summarize
    TotalEvents = count(),
    Blocked = countif(DeviceAction in ('block', 'Block', 'deny', 'Deny', 'drop', 'Drop', 'reset', 'Reset')),
    Allowed = countif(DeviceAction in ('allow', 'Allow', 'pass', 'Pass', 'permit', 'Permit')),
    UniqueAttackIPs = dcount(SourceIP)
| project TotalEvents, Blocked, Allowed, UniqueAttackIPs","size":4,"title":"WAF summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Blocked","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redBright"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-waf"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor has_any ('Fortinet', 'F5') and DeviceProduct has_any ('WAF', 'BIG-IP', 'ASM', 'FortiWeb')
| summarize AttackCount = count() by Activity
| where isnotempty(Activity)
| sort by AttackCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Top WAF attack signatures detected","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AttackCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":1000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-waf-attacks"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor has_any ('Fortinet', 'F5') and DeviceProduct has_any ('WAF', 'BIG-IP', 'ASM', 'FortiWeb')
| summarize AttackCount = count() by SourceIP
| sort by AttackCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Top attacker IPs","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AttackCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":1000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-waf-ips"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔴 WAF Allow → App Server Error (Successful Bypass)"},"name":"bypass-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let WAFAllowed = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor has_any ('Fortinet', 'F5') and DeviceProduct has_any ('WAF', 'BIG-IP', 'ASM', 'FortiWeb')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'Allow', 'pass', 'Pass', 'permit', 'Permit')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize WAFAllowCount = count(), AllowedURI = make_set(RequestURL, 5) by SourceIP;
let AppErrors = W3CIISLog
| where scStatus startswith '5'
| where isnotempty(cIP)
| summarize ServerErrors = count(), ErrorURIs = make_set(csUriStem, 5) by cIP;
WAFAllowed
| join kind=inner (AppErrors | project SourceIP = cIP, ServerErrors, ErrorURIs) on SourceIP
| project SourceIP, WAFAllowCount, AllowedURI, ServerErrors, ErrorURIs
| sort by ServerErrors desc","size":0,"title":"IPs allowed by WAF that triggered server-side errors — potential successful exploitation","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"WAFAllowCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":1000}},{"columnMatch":"ServerErrors","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":200}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-waf-bypass"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📋 Web Server Error Analysis (IIS + Syslog Apache/Nginx)"},"name":"webserver-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"W3CIISLog
| where scStatus startswith '4' or scStatus startswith '5'
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by scStatus, csUriStem
| sort by ErrorCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"IIS error codes and affected URIs","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ErrorCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":1000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-iis-errors"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Syslog
| where ProcessName in ('apache2', 'httpd', 'nginx', 'apache')
| where SyslogMessage has_any ('error', 'critical', 'alert', 'emerg', 'SQL', 'injection', 'XSS', 'traversal', 'exec')
| project TimeGenerated, HostName, ProcessName, SyslogMessage
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Apache/Nginx error and attack log entries","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-apache-errors"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
